resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-profile
resourceTemplates.title: Get TikTok profile
resourceTemplates.description: Returns public TikTok profile information using `username`, `url`, or `user_id`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-profile-videos
resourceTemplates.title: Get TikTok profile videos
resourceTemplates.description: Returns videos from a TikTok profile. Use `username` or `user_id` and paginate with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-video-info
resourceTemplates.title: Get TikTok video info
resourceTemplates.description: Returns data for a TikTok video using `url` or `video_id`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-comments
resourceTemplates.title: Get TikTok comments
resourceTemplates.description: Returns comments for a TikTok video using `url` or `video_id`, with optional pagination via `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-transcript
resourceTemplates.title: Get TikTok transcript
resourceTemplates.description: Returns transcript data for a TikTok video. Use `use_ai=true` as fallback when transcript is missing, which may consume more credits.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-search-keyword
resourceTemplates.title: Search TikTok by keyword
resourceTemplates.description: Searches TikTok videos that match a keyword and supports pagination with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-search-top
resourceTemplates.title: Search TikTok top results
resourceTemplates.description: Returns TikTok top search results, including videos and photo carousels, and supports pagination with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-search-users
resourceTemplates.title: Search TikTok users
resourceTemplates.description: Searches TikTok users matching a query and supports pagination with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-search-hashtag
resourceTemplates.title: Search TikTok by hashtag
resourceTemplates.description: Returns TikTok videos for a hashtag and supports pagination with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-search-music
resourceTemplates.title: Search TikTok music
resourceTemplates.description: Searches TikTok sounds and music by keyword. Use `offset` with the cursor value from previous results to paginate.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-music-details
resourceTemplates.title: Get TikTok song details
resourceTemplates.description: Returns details for a TikTok song by `song_id`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-music-videos
resourceTemplates.title: Get TikToks using a song
resourceTemplates.description: Returns TikTok videos using a song and supports pagination with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-music-popular
resourceTemplates.title: Get popular TikTok songs
resourceTemplates.description: Returns currently popular TikTok songs, optionally filtered by `country`, and supports pagination with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-trending-feed
resourceTemplates.title: Get TikTok trending feed
resourceTemplates.description: Returns trending TikTok feed items, optionally filtered by `country`, with pagination via `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-popular-videos
resourceTemplates.title: Get popular TikTok videos
resourceTemplates.description: Returns popular TikTok videos filtered by `country`, `time_period`, and `sort_by`, with pagination support.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-popular-hashtags
resourceTemplates.title: Get popular TikTok hashtags
resourceTemplates.description: Returns popular TikTok hashtags filtered by country, time period, and whether they are newly trending. Supports pagination with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-popular-creators
resourceTemplates.title: Get popular TikTok creators
resourceTemplates.description: Returns popular TikTok creators with filters for creator country, audience country, follower range, sort order, and pagination.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-followers
resourceTemplates.title: Get TikTok followers
resourceTemplates.description: Returns followers of a TikTok account using `username` or `user_id`, with optional pagination using `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-following
resourceTemplates.title: Get TikTok following
resourceTemplates.description: Returns accounts a TikTok user follows using `username` or `user_id`, with optional pagination using `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-live
resourceTemplates.title: Get TikTok live info
resourceTemplates.description: Returns TikTok live stream information for a user using `username` or `user_id`.

resourceTemplates.name: tiktok-demographics
resourceTemplates.title: Get TikTok audience demographics
resourceTemplates.description: Returns TikTok audience demographics, currently focused on audience countries, for a user identified by `username` or `user_id`.
